Chapterhouse</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="138" data-end="182">Here's what we completed and bundled so far:</p>
<ul data-start="183" data-end="379">
<li data-start="183" data-end="225">
<p data-start="185" data-end="225">🏛 Logo, color palette, and typography</p>
</li>
<li data-start="226" data-end="276">
<p data-start="228" data-end="276">🚪 Storefront doors with mirrored filigree F's</p>
</li>
<li data-start="277" data-end="330">
<p data-start="279" data-end="330">📚 Version built from stacked books + loose pages</p>
</li>
<li data-start="331" data-end="379">
<p data-start="333" data-end="379">🌆 Urban wall mural style (optional alt style)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="381" data-end="393">Let me know:</p>
<ul data-start="394" data-end="589">
<li data-start="394" data-end="450">
<p data-start="396" data-end="450">Should I <strong data-start="405" data-end="433">generate a new variation</strong> of one of those?</p>
</li>
<li data-start="451" data-end="589">
<p data-start="453" data-end="589">Or move forward with the next item on the checklist: <strong data-start="506" data-end="530">reader review system</strong>, <strong data-start="532" data-end="556">social media visuals</strong>, or <strong data-start="561" data-end="588">website submission form</strong>?</p>
</li>
</ul>

</li>

</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="253" data-end="358">I’ll now add this review system beneath each “Read Now” button using controlled components and mock data.</p>

<h3 data-start="345" data-end="372">🔜 NEXT MODULE OPTIONS:</h3>
<h4 data-start="374" data-end="420">🟡 Add onboarding flow (per your mockup):</h4>

<blockquote data-start="437" data-end="502">

<blockquote data-start="520" data-end="594">
<p data-start="522" data-end="594">“Hi, I’m Nia. I’m your BFF guide. Let’s find your first finished story.”</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="596" data-end="691">→ This can be a <strong data-start="612" data-end="646">mobile-friendly modal sequence</strong> that appears the first time a reader visits.</p>

<p data-start="728" data-end="771">→ Dropdown or tabs (Fantasy, Romance, etc.)</p>
